summary: UI/UX Audit iteration 58 testing complete. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All requested features verified - More page profile card enlarged, no duplicate Train Jessi AI entry, My Activity shows All Time and Custom period pills with date range picker, Company Docs shows category cards with descriptions and count badges, Inbox archive uses optimistic UI.
critical_code_review_comments: More page Profile & AI section correctly has 3 items: My Digital Card, AI Persona, Voice Training - no Train Jessi AI duplicate
Profile card avatar is 60x60 and name font is 19px as specified
My Activity page has all 6 period pills: Today, This Week, This Month, This Year, All Time, Custom
Custom date range picker shows Start Date and End Date inputs with helper text
Backend /api/reports/user-activity/{user_id}?period=all_time returns valid data with start_date from 2020-01-01
Company Docs category headers are modern cards with icon, title, description (e.g., 'Legal documents & compliance'), and count badge
WebSwipeableItem correctly uses native <div> for close overlay on web (line 174-188 in WebSwipeableItem.tsx)
Inbox handleArchive function has optimistic UI update (lines 539-544) and properly awaits loadConversations (line 552)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data - used existing user and conversation data
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI/UX Audit iteration 58 complete. All features working: (1) More page has Profile & AI with 3 items (My Digital Card, AI Persona, Voice Training) - no Train Jessi AI duplicate. Profile card enlarged to 60x60 avatar, 19px name. (2) My Activity on My Account page shows period pills including All Time and Custom. Custom shows date range picker with Start/End date inputs. (3) Company Docs shows category headers as modern cards with descriptions and count badges. (4) Inbox archive uses optimistic UI pattern - immediately updates local state then awaits API. WebSwipeableItem uses native div for close overlay on web.
